compliance.assurance_rationale: APRA CPS 234 23 Incident management — tracking all major incidents fulfils APRA's continuous incident-management evidence requirement.
APRA CPS 234 36 Notification of incidents — complete incident tracking ensures timely APRA-notification compliance.
UK NIS 2018 Reg.11 Incident reporting — incident tracking backs the 72-hour OES/RDSP reporting duty.
PSD2 Art.96 Incident reporting — incident/post-mortem tracking feeds the major operational/security incident reporting duty under PSD2.
Singapore PDPA 2020 amended §26A Data breach notification — incident tracking supplies the 72-hour notification workflow evidence.
